top_findings.summary: The skill description states it is for "process flow generator tasks" and "visual content skills covering diagrams, charts, presentations", but requests unrestricted Bash command execution (Bash(cmd:*)). This permission is excessive for generating diagrams or visual content, as it would allow arbitrary system-level actions unrelated to the stated visual generation purpose (e.g., file system manipulation, network access, or privilege escalation). The skill should be limited to specific, necessary tools for diagram generation (e.g., specific diagramming CLI tools) rather than full system command access.
